\section{The FLRW metric}

The metric is given by
\begin{align}
ds^2 = -c^2 dt^2 + a(t)^2 (dx^2+dy^2+dz^2).
\end{align}

\subsection{Metric tensor $g_{\mu\nu}$}
\begin{align}
\left[\begin{matrix}- c^{2} & 0 & 0 & 0\\0 & a^{2}{\left(t \right)} & 0 & 0\\0 & 0 & a^{2}{\left(t \right)} & 0\\0 & 0 & 0 & a^{2}{\left(t \right)}\end{matrix}\right]
\end{align}

\subsection{Christoffel symbols $\Gamma^{\mu}_{\nu\rho}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
\Gamma^{t}_{x x} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
\Gamma^{t}_{y y} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
\Gamma^{t}_{z z} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
\Gamma^{x}_{t x} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\Gamma^{x}_{x t} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\Gamma^{y}_{t y} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\Gamma^{y}_{y t} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\Gamma^{z}_{t z} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\Gamma^{z}_{z t} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\end{align}

\subsection{Riemann curvature tensor $R^{\mu}_{\ \nu\rho\sigma}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
R^{t}_{x t x} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{t}_{x x t} &= - \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{t}_{y t y} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{t}_{y y t} &= - \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{t}_{z t z} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{t}_{z z t} &= - \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{x}_{t t x} &= \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R^{x}_{t x t} &= - \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R^{x}_{y x y} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{x}_{y y x} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{x}_{z x z} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{x}_{z z x} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{y}_{t t y} &= \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R^{y}_{t y t} &= - \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R^{y}_{x x y} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{y}_{x y x} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{y}_{z y z} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{y}_{z z y} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{z}_{t t z} &= \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R^{z}_{t z t} &= - \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R^{z}_{x x z} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{z}_{x z x} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{z}_{y y z} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R^{z}_{y z y} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
\end{align}

\subsection{Weyl curvature tensor $C^{\mu}_{\ \nu\rho\sigma}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
All components zero.
\end{align}

\subsection{Ricci tensor $R_{\mu\nu}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
R_{tt} &= - \frac{3 \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
R_{xx} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R_{yy} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
R_{zz} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
\end{align}

\subsection{Ricci scalar $R$}
\begin{align}
\frac{6 \left(a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}\right)}{c^{2} a^{2}{\left(t \right)}}
\end{align}

\subsection{Einstein tensor $G_{\mu\nu}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
G_{tt} &= \frac{3.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{a^{2}{\left(t \right)}} \\
G_{xx} &= \frac{- 2.0 a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} - 1.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
G_{yy} &= \frac{- 2.0 a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} - 1.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
G_{zz} &= \frac{- 2.0 a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} - 1.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\
\end{align}

\subsection{Geodesic equations}
\begin{align}
\ddot{t} = - \frac{\dot{x}^{2} a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} - \frac{\dot{y}^{2} a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} - \frac{\dot{z}^{2} a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\
\ddot{x} = - \frac{2 \dot{t} \dot{x} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\ddot{y} = - \frac{2 \dot{t} \dot{y} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\ddot{z} = - \frac{2 \dot{t} \dot{z} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\
\end{align}

where $\lambda$ is an affine parameter and $\dot{x}^\mu = dx^\mu/d\lambda$.

\subsection{Kretschmann scalar $R_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}R^{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}$}
\subsubsection*{Full expression}
\begin{align}
\frac{12 \left(\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{4} a^{2}{\left(t \right)}} + \frac{12 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{4}}{c^{4} a^{4}{\left(t \right)}}
\end{align}

\subsubsection*{Simplified expression}
\begin{align}
\frac{12 \left(a^{2}{\left(t \right)} \left(\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2} + \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{4}\right)}{c^{4} a^{4}{\left(t \right)}}
\end{align}

\subsection{Ricci squared $R_{\mu\nu}R^{\mu\nu}$}
\begin{align}
\frac{3 \left(\left(a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}\right)^{2} + 3 a^{2}{\left(t \right)} \left(\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}\right)}{c^{4} a^{4}{\left(t \right)}}
\end{align}

\subsection{Gauss-Bonnet scalar $\mathcal{R}_{GB} = R^2 - 4R_{\mu\nu}R^{\mu\nu} + R_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}R^{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}$}
\begin{align}
\frac{24 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{4} a^{3}{\left(t \right)}}
\end{align}

\subsection{Weyl squared scalar $C_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}C^{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}$}
\begin{align}
0
\end{align}

For the conformally flat FLRW metric the Weyl tensor vanishes, so this scalar is identically zero.
